data.name: Dream Seduction: A Gay Dating
data.detailed_description:
Dream Seduction is an adult visual novel that puts you lost in a medieval castle. You've been caught and now you need to have a little talk with the king so you can get out alive.

You'll have to talk to the king to get out of it, while gaining his trust and becoming closer.

Features:

  • Engaging and spicy story

  • Seductive Choices That Shape Your Destiny

  • 3D, hairy, real-time character

  • Made for one-handed play

data.short_description: Dream Seduction is a short visual novel with a homosexual theme. The story is all set in the king's room and you must convince him to let you live. Earn the king's trust and enjoy being the new royal assistant.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X11 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
